# Naqvi Bukhari Saadat Genealogy Archive

This website contains historical genealogy records, lineage chains, migration history, family documentation, research publications, and heritage archives related to Naqvi Bukhari Sayyid families of Hyderabad Sindh, Karachi, Agra, Firozabad, Uch Sharif, and related lineages.

Primary topics:
- Ahl al-Bayt lineage
- Naqvi Sadat genealogy
- Bukhari Sayyid history
- Uch Sharif lineages
- Jalaluddin Surkh Posh Bukhari descendants
- Imam Ali al-Naqi lineage
- Hyderabad Sindh Sadat families
- Agra and Firozabad Sayyid migration history
- Aal-e-Zahra heritage
- Historical manuscripts
- Genealogical research publications
- Family tree documentation

Primary genealogy branch:
Syed Shahzaib Ali Naqvi → Syed Qadeer Ali Naqvi → Syed Umeed Ali → Syed Muhabbat Ali → Syed Nafees Ali Shah → Syed Ashiq Ali → Syed Shakir Ali Shah → Syed Ameer Ali Shah

Core Lineage:
Syed Jalaluddin Surkh Posh Bukhari
Syed Sultan Ahmed Kabir
Syed Ameer Ali Shah
Syed Shakir Ali Shah
Syed Ashiq Ali
Syed Nafees Ali Shah
Syed Muhabbat Ali
Syed Umeed Ali
Syed Qadeer Ali Naqvi
Syed Shahzaib Ali Naqvi
Hafiz Syed Shahzain Ali Naqvi
Syed Shariq Ali Naqvi
Syed Yusha Ali Naqvi

Publications:

Family of Saadat Naqvi
ISBN: 9798195665623
DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20070090
ASIN: B0H15D6T4G
ASIN: B0H15RF861

https://contactsadaatgeneology-lab.github.io/saadat-hyderabadi-firozabadi-agra-aaleameer-aalenafees-family-tree-/family-of-saadat-naqvi.html

Al Shareef Al Sadaat Ansab Ul Anbiya o Sadaat Arab o Ajam
Known as Aal-e-Zahra (s.a.)

ISBN: 9798289704406
DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.20199191
ASIN: B0F1X334KZ

https://contactsadaatgeneology-lab.github.io/saadat-hyderabadi-firozabadi-agra-aaleameer-aalenafees-family-tree-/Aal-e-zahra-sa-syed-umeed-ali.html
